page_content:
790 LBSC - Library Science

LBSC702 User Instruction (3 Credits)

Critical analysis of the rationale, content, and processes of user instruction in library and information settings.

Prerequisite: LBSC602; or permission of instructor.

Restriction: Permission of INFO-College of Information Studies.

LBSC703 Field Study in Archives and Digital Curation (3 Credits) Supervised internship experience in archives or digital curation programs in organizations and institutions.

Prerequisite: LBSC602, LBSC631, and LBSC671; and must have completed 9 additional credits. Or permission of instructor.

Restriction: Must be in Library and Information Science (Master's) program; and permission of INFO-College of Information Studies.
